title: The promises and pitfalls of personalized health
summary: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. title: خاما بيليات: رفضت الأهلي والزمالك لهذا السبب
